meta.note: This block is partly theoretical inference because there is no direct edible/eat probe in the current local artifacts.

formulas.predicate_activation: Eat(x, context, t) = sigmoid(w_b * B_edible(x) + w_f * B_food_family(x) + w_o * O_x + w_r * R_consume(context, t) + w_s * State_body(t) - w_i * I_block(x, context))
formulas.entity_entry: h_x = P_Bworld(x) + P_Bobject(x) + P_Bedible(x) + P_Bfamily(x) + Δ_x
formulas.system_decoding: CanEat(x, t) ≠ one fixed neuron; it is the readout of entity basis, predicate route, and current body-context gate.

schema.different_part: 具体实体或家族的入口偏移 Δ_x / B_family(x)

verdict.core_answer: “吃”更像一个可复用谓词协议壳，而不是单一固定编码。苹果、水果、肉类进入这个壳的入口不同，但会在较高层共享一部分可食用通路。
